sentence-length-cv: writing has a metronomic rhythm — every sentence hits the same beat. vary structure: combine related ideas, break apart compound ones, use subordinate clauses or fragments where natural
sentence-length-kurtosis: Your sentences are all similar length. Rewrite whole paragraphs: merge related short sentences into longer, layered ones; also insert a few very short or very long sentences for contrast.
word-freq-dispersion: key words are sprinkled too uniformly — concentrate terminology where it's relevant instead of distributing it evenly across the text
